html:
2026-0379
2026-04-23CFIA, AAFCPlant Breeders' Rights ActRegulations Amending the Plant Breeders' Rights RegulationsRegulations Amending the Plant Breeders' Rights Regulations in order to (1) narrow the scope of application of the farmers’ privilege exemption; (2) extend the duration of Plant Breeders' Rights (PBR) protection from 20 to 25 years for potatoes, asparagus, and woody plants; (3) update the filing requirements to encourage PBR applications; and (4) align the Regulations with the PBR Act and make housekeeping amendments.Registration: SOR/2026-0074 Publication Date: 2026-05-06
subject: Regulations Amending the Plant Breeders' Rights Regulations
precis: Regulations Amending the Plant Breeders' Rights Regulations in order to (1) narrow the scope of application of the farmers’ privilege exemption; (2) extend the duration of Plant Breeders' Rights (PBR) protection from 20 to 25 years for potatoes, asparagus, and woody plants; (3) update the filing requirements to encourage PBR applications; and (4) align the Regulations with the PBR Act and make housekeeping amendments.
